weight_transform: reshape broadcast operand (in1, e.g. layernorm gamma or scalar scale tensor) to bcast-compatible shape for the chosen BcastOpDim and convert to TILE_LAYOUT
applicability_notes: Broadcast multiply along H, W, or HW. Used for attention score scaling (BcastOpDim.HW with scalar scale, followed by softmax_in_place) and for layernorm gamma application (BcastOpDim.H).

memory_config.shard_spec_template: inherits attention_scores.memory_config(); consumed in-place by softmax_in_place with softmax_program_config

placement_observations.source: attention call site: memory_config=attention_scores.memory_config(); used on non-causal fallback path (else-branch of fused scale-mask-softmax)
